<UIForeground>F201FC</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FD</UIGlow> Quest Sync<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>
Tataramu wishes you to assist him in procuring another part for the <Emphasis>Dezul Qualan</Emphasis>.
※The crafting portion of this quest is recommended for Disciples of the Hand level 15 and above.

<UIForeground>F201FC</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FD</UIGlow> Quest Sync<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>
Tataramu wishes you to assist him in procuring another part for the <Emphasis>Dezul Qualan</Emphasis>.
※The crafting portion of this quest is recommended for Disciples of the Hand level 15 and above.

1:
Tataramu has asked you to approach Gerolt with the task of forging the <Emphasis>Dezul Qualan</Emphasis>'s unique steering mechanism. Take the helm component materials, and speak with the master weaponsmith at Hyrstmill.

※Please note that the difficulty of this quest has been synced to your current level.

Tataramu has asked you to approach Gerolt with the task of forging the <Emphasis>Dezul Qualan</Emphasis>'s unique steering mechanism. Take the helm component materials, and speak with the master weaponsmith at Hyrstmill.

※Please note that the difficulty of this quest has been synced to your current level.

3:
After listening to your request, Drake contrives a plan to help you ensnare his suffering master's attention. Craft four high-quality helm components from the materials returned to you by the apprentice, and then shove your inspiring handiwork right under Gerolt's nose.

※In the event that the status <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Facility Access: Production<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> wears off or the synthesis ends in failure, you may try again by speaking with Drake.
